Homepage.heroTitle: Find Your Perfect Car with TQ Auto
Homepage.heroSubtitle: Premium inspected vehicles with detailed specifications, photography, and online booking flow to accelerate decision making.
Homepage.featuresSub1: History, mileage, legal standing, and performance are thoroughly reviewed before being listed.
Homepage.featuresSub2: Select your vehicle, pick a time slot, and receive instant confirmation from our team.
Homepage.featuresSub3: Total fees, taxes, and financial plans are clearly calculated and presented.
Homepage.inventorySub: Vehicle layouts follow Stitch design standards: large photos, transparent statuses, highlighted prices, and full spec sheets.
Homepage.appointmentSub: Select your car, send a request, and let admin manage appointments and consulting states in a single flow.
Homepage.newsSub: Detailed vehicle reviews, used car purchasing tips, and helpful guides compiled by TQ Auto experts.

CarDetails.notFoundSub: This vehicle does not exist or has been hidden.
CarDetails.reservedNotice: This vehicle is currently reserved by another customer. Please contact our showroom for details.
CarDetails.specsSub: All data points and images are linked dynamically from our database instead of static mock files.
CarDetails.relatedTitle: Other vehicles from the same year

Booking.title: Book Inspection & Test Drive
Booking.subtitle: Register your appointment details so TQ Auto showroom can prepare the test vehicle and welcome you.
Booking.success: Test drive appointment successfully booked! We will contact you shortly.
Booking.error: Invalid booking details. Please review your inputs.
